aboutMe.headline: About me
aboutMe.text: Hey, I'm Jens! I'm a passionate frontend developer who loves turning ideas into real digital experiences. I see every challenge as a chance to think more efficiently and find elegant solutions. Curiosity drives me — whether it's new technologies, cleaner code, or more thoughtful design. Let's collaborate and build something remarkable together!
aboutMe.cardImgAlt3: Decorative torn paper card home office

skills.head: My Stack
skills.cardtext: Extensive expertise in modern web technologies, versatile from UI design to backend development.
skills.cardImgAlt: Decorative torn paper for skills section
skills.cardImgAltMobile: Decorative torn paper for skills section (mobile)

contact.headline: Ready to work together?
contact.texttop: I look forward to hearing from you! Let me know what role you see me in within your team. With my experience, passion for modern web technologies, and constant willingness to learn, I am confident that I can provide real added value.
contact.textbottom: I am open to new projects and challenges and bring not only technical expertise but also team spirit and creativity.

legalNotice.headline: Legal Notice
legalNotice.acceptanceText: The contents of my portfolio were created with the greatest care. However, I cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the contents. As a website operator, I am responsible for my own content on these pages in accordance with general laws.
legalNotice.scopeText1: My portfolio contains links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no influence. Therefore, I cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
legalNotice.scopeText2: The linked pages were checked by me for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. However, a permanent control of the contents of the linked pages is not reasonable for me without concrete evidence of a violation of the law.
legalNotice.proprietaryText: The content and works created by me on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require my written consent. Downloads and copies of this page are permitted for private use only.
legalNotice.useText: The use of my portfolio is generally possible without stating personal data. Insofar as personal data (for example name, address or email addresses) are collected on my pages, this is always done, as far as possible, on a voluntary basis. This data will not be passed on to third parties without my express consent.
legalNotice.disclaimerText: Insofar as the content on this page was not created by me, the copyrights of third parties are respected. In particular, I identify third-party content as such. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please inform me accordingly.
legalNotice.indemnityText: This disclaimer is to be regarded as part of my online offer. If parts or individual formulations of this text do not, no longer or not completely correspond to the current legal situation, the remaining parts of the document remain unaffected in their content and validity.
legalNotice.contact: For any questions or notices, please contact me at the email address provided above.

colleagues.headline: Colleagues' Thoughts
colleagues.testimonial1: Jens is a dedicated developer who always goes the extra mile. His technical expertise was a huge asset to our project.
colleagues.testimonial2: Collaborating with Jens was a fantastic experience. He has a unique talent for solving complex problems with elegant code.
colleagues.testimonial3: Highly recommended! Jens is a reliable professional who brings both creativity and technical precision to the team.

projects.headline: Projects
projects.description: Encourage people to take a look and interact with your projects. Highlight your approach to creating responsive, user-friendly projects with efficient code.

join.description: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

pollo.description: Jump, run and throw game based on object-oriented approach. Help Pepe to find coins and tabasco salsa to fight against the crazy hen.

pokedex.description: A simple library based on the PokeAPI to find and view your favorite Pokemon with all their stats.
